{{Infobox character
| name = The Hound
| aliases = the Hound
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]]
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Hound]] is pushing the [[Monarchs]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Hound]] observed that the [[Dragon King]] did not intend to advance.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Hound]] is a [[Judge]] who disapproved of unsealing [[Ozriel]]'s mouth.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1">''Dreadgod'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Hound]] is a character who can make the [[Scythe of Ozriel]] and the [[Sword of Makiel]] vanish with gestures.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The Hound sighed. "I suppose the Dragon King doesn’t intend to advance."<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
